message:
🌱 Add thanos: sidecar support https and basic auth access to Prometheus mission (#784)

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,74 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "thanos-3975-sidecar-support-https-and-basic-auth-access-to-prometheus",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "thanos: sidecar support https and basic auth access to Prometheus",
+    "description": "sidecar support https and basic auth access to Prometheus. Requested by 6+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current thanos deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your thanos version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n thanos -l app.kubernetes.io/name=thanos\nhelm list -n thanos 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working thanos installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review thanos configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant thanos configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n thanos -l app.kubernetes.io/name=thanos\nkubectl get configmap -n thanos -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=thanos\n```\nSince Prometheus version 2.24, we can configure basic authentication and TLS for Prometheus, in my case, the Prometheus provide service directly to the whole internal network, so we enable login credential and TLS (we don't want everyone access"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for sidecar support https and basic auth access to Prometheus",
+        "description": "Added new flag `prometheus.http-client` to sidecar to pass http client config via file or string(similar to [alertmanager](https://thanos.io/tip/components/rule.md/#configuration)). Using this flag an instance of `thanoshttp.Client` is created and is passed to `promclient.NewClient`  method which uses this client as base client instead of whole new client which then makes authori\n\nSee the source issue for community-verified solutions."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n thanos -l app.kubernetes.io/name=thanos\nkubectl get events -n thanos --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"sidecar support https and basic auth access to Prometheus\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Added new flag `prometheus.http-client` to sidecar to pass http client config via file or string(similar to [alertmanager](https://thanos.io/tip/components/rule.md/#configuration)). Using this flag an instance of `thanoshttp.Client` is created and is passed to `promclient.NewClient`  method which uses this client as base client instead of whole new client which then makes authori\n\nSee the source issue and linked PR for the complete solution details.",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "thanos",
+      "incubating",
+      "observability",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "thanos"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [],
+    "difficulty": "beginner",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "incubating",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/thanos-io/thanos/issues/3975",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/thanos-io/thanos",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/thanos-io/thanos/pull/4104"
+    },
+    "reactions": 6,
+    "comments": 15,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl",
+      "thanos"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with Thanos deployed (sidecar, query, store gateway, compactor as needed). The thanos binary provides subcommands for each component."
+  },
